description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has two jobs: pre-commit and test. The pre-commit job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the repository with a ref to the pull request HEAD commit, sets up Python, installs dependencies from requirements-dev.txt, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest with multiple Python versions, checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest.
